creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Enji Cooper from comment #7)

Hi ngie,

No effort from me lately. Probably should start with a new exp-run.
Situation should've improved, e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 has 3.0 if I recall correctly.

Beware of 3.0: if you need performance, apparently it is 10x slower than 1.1.1.

Let me know how I can help, be conscious that I don't have much time to spend.

Cheers, Bernard.
